name: @webspinner-foundation/genesis
description: Provisions a Webspinner Cell — toolchain, Grimoire, Loom, vault — from a fresh macOS or Linux host. The work Claude Code did once at the founding, encoded as a re-runnable Spinner so every future Cell follows the same recipe.

env.name: WARP_TARGET_HOST
env.description: Hostname or LAN IP of the target Cell. Defaults to localhost when running locally on the target.

env.name: WARP_TARGET_USER
env.description: Unix user on the target. Defaults to the invoking user.

capabilities.name: provisionToolchain
capabilities.description: Ensure Homebrew (macOS) or apt (Linux) is present, then install Node, pnpm, PocketBase, Tailscale.

capabilities.name: syncRepo
capabilities.description: Place the Warp repo on the target. Source: a path, a git remote, or a signed bundle.

capabilities.name: buildWorkspace
capabilities.description: Run pnpm install and pnpm -r build on the target.

capabilities.name: generateBootstrapState
capabilities.description: Generate the vault master key, PocketBase superuser email and password, and any other one-shot secrets. Mode-600 files under ~/.warp/bootstrap/.

capabilities.name: deployGrimoire
capabilities.description: Stand up PocketBase as a launchd LaunchAgent (macOS) or systemd user unit (Linux). Bind to 127.0.0.1:8090. Initialise superuser. Create the canonical collections (vault_secrets, wp_audit, wp_silk_pattern).

capabilities.name: seedVault
capabilities.description: Encrypt the operator's BYOK keys with the vault master key and POST them to the vault_secrets collection. Source for keys: the operator's keychain (macOS Keychain / GNOME Keyring / etc.). The Wizard never pastes into a Claude Code session.

capabilities.name: deployLoom
capabilities.description: Stand up the Loom (SvelteKit Node bundle) as a launchd LaunchAgent. Bind to LAN by default; restrict to Tailscale interface when Tailscale is configured.

capabilities.name: verifyCell
capabilities.description: Confirm Loom answers on its bound port; confirm Grimoire is reachable; confirm vault has at least the BYOK key; emit a `wp.cell.provisioned` audit event.
